Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking and metadata for the "Golf" app.

## Folders
- **[src](src/README.md)**: Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking and static byte arrays for golf API icon PNG data.

## Files
- **[appinfo.json](appinfo.json.md)**: Metadata for the "Golf" app in the Pebble firmware, including version and display settings.
